explanation: This file explains the data flow for career path generation - what gets sent to LLM vs what comes from RAG/Firestore

llm_input.description: Data sent to LLM for career path generation - RAG search result + user profile data
llm_input.source: RAG output (highest scoring search result) + User assessment/profile data

searchResult.title: University Professor
searchResult.description: University Professors are educators and researchers who teach undergraduate and graduate students, conduct original research, and contribute to their field of expertise through publications and presentations.
searchResult.content: University professors typically hold a PhD in their field and are experts in their subject matter. They lecture, lead seminars, supervise research projects, and mentor students. They also engage in scholarly activities, such as publishing research papers, attending conferences, and seeking funding for research projects. In the Indian context, professors often play a crucial role in shaping the next generation of leaders and contributing to national development through research and innovation.

relatedCareers.reason: Conducts research and contributes to scientific knowledge.
Shares knowledge and educates students at different levels.
Manages academic programs and departments within a university.

financialFeasibility.note: Requires extensive higher education (PhD). While government universities offer subsidized education, private institutions can be expensive. Financial aid and scholarships are available, but competition is high. Salary is generally comfortable but not exceptionally high compared to some private sector jobs.

genderDistribution.note: While traditionally male-dominated, the field is becoming increasingly diverse with more women pursuing academic careers. Some departments may still exhibit gender imbalances.

relatedCareers.reason: Conducts research and contributes to scientific knowledge.
Shares knowledge and educates students at different levels.
Manages academic programs and departments within a university.

llm_input.data_size_reduction: ~80% reduction compared to sending all search results
llm_input.cost_optimization: Significantly reduced LLM input costs by sending only highest scoring result

firestore_data_sources.description: Data retrieved from Firestore collections to build complete career path

dream_careers.purpose: RAG search to find matching careers and related careers
dream_careers.query: Search dream_careers collection using user profile for career matching
dream_careers.output: Search results with scores, including relatedCareers array with full dream career objects
fields_used: All fields from dream_career.json model for matching and related careers

data_usage.rag_search: Used for finding best matching career and related careers
data_usage.related_careers: Already included in RAG result's relatedCareers array

firestore_data_sources.note: All data comes from RAG search results. No separate Firestore queries needed. LLM generates all learn/connect/grow sections.

step_1.description: Search dream_careers collection using user profile
step_1.filter: Select only highest scoring result for LLM input

step_2.description: Send highest scoring RAG result + user profile data to LLM for career path generation
step_2.input: Single search result with metadata + user profile data (assessment responses)
step_2.output: Generated career path content including all learn/connect/grow sections (whatYouDo, whyItMatters, matchReasoning, expectedSalaryRange, investmentLevel, paybackPeriod, archetypes, dreamTitle, entranceExams, streamSuggestions, toolsAndSoftware, topInstitutions, onlineTrainings, scholarships, recommendedCourses, careerCommunities, internshipExamples, careerPathway)

step_3.description: Combine LLM output with RAG data into complete career path

structure.basic_info: From RAG result (id, title, description) + From LLM (whatYouDo, whyItMatters, matchReasoning, expectedSalaryRange, investmentLevel, paybackPeriod, archetypes, dreamTitle) - personalized using profileData
structure.learn: From LLM (entranceExams, streamSuggestions, toolsAndSoftware, topInstitutions, onlineTrainings, scholarships, recommendedCourses) - personalized using profileData
structure.grow: From LLM (internshipExamples, careerPathway) - personalized using profileData
structure.relatedCareers: From RAG result (relatedCareers array with full dream career objects)
structure.profileData: User assessment responses (financialBackground, goals, interests, personalityTraits, grade, stream, strengths, parentalInfluence)

cost_optimization.llm_input_reduction: ~80% reduction in data sent to LLM
cost_optimization.before: All search results + profile data + matching details
cost_optimization.after: Only highest scoring search result + essential profile data
cost_optimization.estimated_savings: Significant cost reduction for LLM API calls while maintaining personalization

performance_benefits.reduced_storage: Only essential RAG data stored in career_paths
performance_benefits.scalable_architecture: Efficient data flow for high-volume usage
